LSE-HS10-L1-BR300-HSVPA910-MCF-GBL-01 • HS Visual & Performing Arts Grade 9-10 • Theatre

From Mountains to Storm

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What did the students figure out?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen again. Say what the boy says out loud.
